messages.content:
Good day Spectroplus! Inquire sana ako for custom house construction package. Project info:

Name: Alfonzo Reyes
Project Type: 2-Storey Modern Industrial Residential Build (approx 160 sqm floor area)
Location: Lot 4 Blk 11, Orchard Estate, Brgy. Salitran IV, Dasmariñas, Cavite
Contact Number: 0915-333-4455

Hoping to get a rough price assessment framework for materials and complete structural labor. Thanks!

Hello Sir Alfonzo! Thank you for the complete specifications. A 160 sqm 2-storey house fits perfectly on that lot layout size. Yes, we provide full structural architectural services. Do you have a preferred floor layout concept in mind (number of rooms, balcony layout, etc.)?
Salamat sa reply! We prefer an open floor layout paradigm with high structural ceilings sana. Looking forward to your response regarding the price matrix parameters.

Noted on the layout details, Sir Alfonzo! An open layout with high ceilings is a beautiful choice. Our engineering estimator is currently computing the structural material requirements. We will send you the basic estimate range by this coming Wednesday afternoon. Thank you for your patience!
Hi Spectroplus team, follow up ko lang po sana ito? Sabi niyo nung Wednesday isesend niyo yung basic framework estimate costs computation para macheck namin.

Mukhang hindi niyo na po aasikasuhin itong project design proposal namin. It's been over two weeks since the promised deadline. Maghahanap na lang kami ng ibang design and build crew na mas responsive. Sayang.

Hello, looking for an experienced design and build team for my new branch office. Please see details:

Name: Dr. Alvin Panganiban
Project: Dental Clinic Renovation & Commercial Fit-out (65 sqm floor area with X-ray room)
Address: Unit 304, 3rd Floor, Corporate Plaza, Alabang, Muntinlupa City
Contact Number: 0917-888-1122

Do you have experience building clinics with complex structural plumbing requirements?

Hi Dr. Alvin! Thank you for messaging Spectroplus. Yes, we specialize in commercial medical and dental clinic fit-outs, ensuring compliance with local health department structural standards. We checked your floor plan draft and we can accommodate 3 treatment rooms in that area.

Looks great! Importante sa akin na heavy duty yung materials for the dental chairs drainage plumbing line at insulation dun sa X-ray room. Can you send the formal contract and proposal overview so I can check your terms?

Understood, Doc. For medical/dental setups, we exclusively use premium lead-lined drywall panels for the X-ray section and medical-grade seamless vinyl flooring for easy sanitation. Attached here is our formal commercial fit-out proposal and breakdown contract.
Good day Dr. Alvin! Just following up if you have any questions regarding the mobilization terms or the milestone payment structure we drafted? We can adjust the phases to align with your preference.

Hi Spectroplus team! Inquire sana ako para magpatayo ng bahay. Complete details below:

Name: Arnel Bautista
Project: 2-Storey Modern Residential House (3 Bedrooms)
Location: Phase 2, Golden Horizon Subdivision, Brgy. Hugo Perez, General Trias, Cavite
Contact Number: 0917-765-4321

May basic sketch plan na ako mula sa lot title blueprint. Pwede ba kayo tumawag bukas?

Good day, Sir Arnel! Thank you very much for providing your complete details. A 3-bedroom modern home is perfect for a 120 sqm lot in General Trias. One of our engineers will call you on your mobile number tomorrow morning to discuss the design package and free estimation process. Speak with you soon!

Hello, inquire po ako for a commercial renovation package. Details below:

Name: Bianca Torres
Project Type: Commercial Spa & Wellness Clinic Fit-out (80 sqm leased space area)
Address: Unit 105, Ground Floor, Central Commercial Plaza, Brgy. Palico IV, Imus, Cavite
Contact Number: 0927-444-9988

Kailangan na po namin magka-site inspection layout design map configuration mapping parameters to submit to mall developers. Available po ba kayo this week for site check?

Good day Ms. Bianca! Thank you for the detailed information. We handle commercial interior fit-outs and workspace renovations regularly. We have an open slot for a technical ocular inspection at your leased space tomorrow morning around 10:00 AM. Pwede po ba natin i-lock in?
Perfect, sige po. Kita na lang tayo sa site layout details building complex entrance panel tomorrow morning. Salamat!

Thank you for welcoming our team earlier, Ms. Bianca! The measurements for the plumbing channels and partition points are complete. Our architects will prepare the initial 3D design concept rendering and project timeline overview. Give us 5 working days to draft everything for you.

Hi Spectroplus team! Follow up ko lang po yung initial 3D design concept model presentation at pricing draft blueprint? Mahigit isang linggo na po kasi tapos nung ocular inspection visit sa property space framework location natin.

Hello? Any updates? Nakakahiya naman sa building manager outline namin, tinatanong na ako kung kailan ipapasa yung structural design guidelines template overview. Pakisabi naman kung hindi niyo na itutuloy para hindi kami umaasa sa wala.

Good day. Inquire ako para sa residential family lot project ko. Here are the details:

Name: Engr. Christian Pineda
Project Type: 2-Storey Modern Duplex Residential House (for my parents and my sibling)
Address: Blk 12 Lot 3, Meadowood Executive Village, Brgy. Panapaan VIII, Bacoor, Cavite
Contact Number: 0920-444-1122

May basic structural drafting concepts na akong nagawa, looking for a construction partner framework to execute the build phase. Let me know when we can talk over the phone. Thanks.

Welcome to Spectroplus, Engr. Christian! Building a duplex for your parents is a wonderful project. We are highly experienced with firewall layouts and structural zoning guidelines in Bacoor. Let's arrange a brief introductory brief discovery call today at your convenience.

Good day! I would like to request a quote for a commercial fit-out project. Details below:

Name: Clarisse Ramos
Project Type: Coffee Shop Interior Renovation / Fit-out (45 sqm bare space)
Location: Unit G-2, The Strip Mall, Aguirre Ave, BF Homes, Parañaque City
Contact Number: 0918-987-6543

Open po ba kayo for ocular this week?

Perfect space for a cozy setup, Clarisse! We handle commercial fit-outs regularly. We can schedule an ocular inspection this Tuesday to get the exact structural measurements. Would you like us to prepare a preliminary 3D draft as well?
Yes please! Yung Industrial Cozy theme sana like what you did with your commercial project last year. Excited to see the initial quotation.
Hi Clarisse! Attached here is the formal 3D concept layout and the material specifications for the cafe fit-out. Let us know if you want to revise any of the lighting setup or counter finishes.

Hi Spectroplus, sorry for the late update. We love the proposal, but we have to hold the construction project for now. Nagkaproblema kasi sa partner budget breakdown. We will message you again once we're ready to resume. Thank you so much for your time!

Hello Spectroplus team, saw your residential project feature on Facebook. Inquire sana ako if you build outdoor pools. Details:

Name: Dave Alcantara
Project: 4m x 8m Custom Concrete Infinity Pool with Composite Wood Decking
Location/Address: Lot 14 Phase 3, Ridgeview Heights, Brgy. San Roque, Antipolo City, Rizal
Contact Number: 0927-777-8899

Our backyard terrain is a bit sloped. Looking forward to your response on structural safety for this.

Hi Dave! Thank you for considering Spectroplus. Yes, we design and construct custom concrete swimming pools with composite wood decking. We handle everything from excavation, structural plumbing, to filtration systems. Let us review the slope details.
Medyo sloping yung backyard field namin kaya concern ko talaga is structural safety at drainage. Do you use poured concrete or block structures for pool walls? I want to make sure it lasts.

For a 4m x 8m infinity pool on a sloping terrain, we highly recommend using a concrete pile foundation to avoid land slippage. Estimated cost ranges from 1.2M to 1.5M inclusive of heavy retaining wall work. To give you an exact price, we would need a quick ground ocular. When is your preferred schedule?
Hi Dave! Just following up if you'd like to lock in the site visit slot this Wednesday afternoon? Our structural engineer is available to check the soil stability for the pool foundation.

Hello Spectroplus, inquire sana ako regarding structural design and construction management parameters. Plan namin ipagiba yung lumang bahay ng lola ko then build a new structure compound. Property specs below:

Name: Diana Rose Cruz
Project: 3-Storey Modern Townhouse / Residential Multi-Family Complex (approx 220 sqm total floor area structural profile)
Address: 18 Katipunan Avenue Extension, Brgy. Blue Ridge A, Quezon City
Contact Number: 0905-222-9911

Kasama na po ba building permit clearance layout processing structures and demolition management protocols sa systems operations framework package parameters niyo? Paki-message po ako if available dynamic processing discussion details. Thanks!

Hi, I am looking for a contractor to handle industrial maintenance works for our company. Here are the details of our requirement:

Name: Elena Torres (Procurement Officer, Nexus Logistics Corp)
Project: 400 sqm Warehouse Roofing Rehabilitation & Structural Truss Reinforcement
Address: Logistics Hub Compound, Pier 4, North Harbor, Tondo, Manila
Contact Number: (02) 8244-1122 ext 104 / 0922-888-9900

Can you send an engineer for an immediate site inspection?

Good day Ms. Elena. Yes, Spectroplus handles industrial warehouse projects and roofing rehabilitations. We use high-grade long-span rib-type insulated panels to minimize internal heat and ensure structural integrity. We can arrange an ocular visit tomorrow morning.

Hi Ms. Elena! Following up on the formal proposal we submitted yesterday for the warehouse roofing overhaul. We can offer a flexible milestone payment schedule if that helps match your quarterly budget.

Hello. I would like to inform you that management decided to go with an in-house local contractor instead. Your breakdown was very professional and detailed, but your price is a bit higher than our allocated maintenance budget. Thank you anyway.

Understood, Ms. Elena. We understand that pricing is a big factor for maintenance works. If ever you need structural warranty works or heavy engineering reinforcements in the future, Spectroplus is here to help.

Hello Spectroplus team. Nareceive ko na yung summary list ng BOQ cost elements. Sobrang detalyado, salamat. Kaya lang medyo lumagpas kami ng 200k sa maximum allocated ceiling na handa naming gastusin ngayon. May items ba tayong pwedeng mapalitan or ma-adjust sa structural interior material specifications para bumaba?

Hi Sir Gilbert! Yes, we can definitely do value engineering adjustments to achieve your target budget constraint. If we substitute the solid hardwood flooring with heavy-duty SPC vinyl planks, and use premium grade granite instead of custom quartz stone for the kitchen countertops, we can slash around 185,000 PHP from the total initial estimate. The structural structural integrity will remain 100% exactly the same.

Perfect, malaking bawas din pala sa construction total structure price configuration. Sige po, paki-update yung structural layout grid proposal document para mapirmahan na natin at makapag-down payment na kami for mobilization works.
Hi, nagpapatayo ba kayo ng single-detached concrete houses? Magkano po pagawa?
Hello Grace! Thank you for messaging us. Yes, we design and build modern homes. Where is your lot located?
Dito po sa Vigan City, Ilocos Sur. May ongoing operations or team ba kayo rito sa bandang North area?

Hi Ms. Grace. Thank you for the details. As much as we would love to build your dream home, Ilocos Sur is currently outside our operational area. Spectroplus only caters to projects within Metro Manila and CALABARZON to ensure strict engineering supervision. We hope you find a great local contractor there!

Hi Ms. Jasmine! Confirming our schedule for the structural site inspection check this coming Sunday (July 26) at 9:30 AM. May we request the exact pinned address location link or special directions for our service vehicle?

Here is the exact map pin link location po: https://maps.google.com/xyz. Inform ko na rin yung security office ng subdivision cluster framework para hindi kayo harangin sa gate entrance path. Kailangan niyo lang po mag-iwan ng private engineering business company ID.

Received the pinned site location link, Ms. Jasmine. We noted the gate protocol rules. Our engineering supervisor and lot layout team will bring the ground testing kit and electronic rangefinders. We'll be arriving at exactly 9:30 AM this Sunday.
Got it. Paki-text na lang po ako sa contact layout number ko kapag malapit na kayo sa main highway parameter. See you on Sunday morning, safe trip sa engineering crew niyo!

Hello Spectroplus, my cousin highly recommended your team. Ask ko lang kung tumatanggap kayo ng home extension/renovation projects? Ito po details ko:

Name: Jasper Cruz
Project: Second Floor Addition / Home Extension (Lightweight steel structure design)
Location: 45 Internal Road, Metroville Subdivision, Brgy. San Vista, Pasig City
Contact Number: 0905-555-4321

Kailangan ko po sana ng custom plans and BOQ for bank financing application.

Hi Jasper, thanks for reaching out. Yes, we do home extensions. Our structural engineers will need to verify the existing columns first to make sure they can support a lightweight steel frame second-floor addition. We'll put together the blueprint and BOQ you need for the bank.
Sent! Please check your email for the complete structural assessment report and signed blueprints for your bank application. Looking forward to starting the construction soon!
Good day Jasper! Just checking if the bank required any adjustments to the building plans or Bill of Quantities (BOQ) we sent over? We can modify them for you right away.
Hi sir, mukhang matatagalan pa approval ng home loan namin sa bank, may compliance issues daw po sa family lot terms. Hold muna natin yung blueprint contract sign. Pasensya na talaga sa abala.

Good day Spectroplus! I closely follow your page updates. Ask ko lang kung magkano rough estimate niyo per sqm for a house construction build? Details below:

Name: Jonathan Reyes
Project: 2-Storey Modern Farmhouse (approx 180 sqm floor area)
Location: Lot 8 Blk 2, Evergreen Estates, Brgy. Dagatan, Amadeo, Cavite
Contact Number: 0919-333-2211

Hope to get an idea of the budget range. Salamat!

Hello Jonathan! Thank you for inquiring with Spectroplus. We love modern farmhouse designs! For an 180 sqm floor area, our rough estimates range from 4.2M PHP (Standard Finishes) to 5.4M PHP (Premium Finishes). This already covers the complete architectural blueprints, engineering, and building permit processing.
Wow, perfect! Sige po, standard finishes will do for now para sa estimate. Can you send over a basic floor plan draft layout? Gagawin kasi naming family vacation home ito next year.

Hi Jonathan, as requested, here is the preliminary conceptual floor plan for your 180 sqm Modern Farmhouse. We maximized the open-concept living area to give it that airy, vacation home feel. Let us know your thoughts!
Hi Jonathan! Just following up if you and your family liked the initial layout? We can adjust the kitchen orientation if you prefer a wider view of the garden.
Can I get more information about your prices?

Hello Juan! Thank you for reaching out to Spectroplus. We specialize in custom residential design and construction. To give you an idea of the budget, may we ask the location of your lot and your target floor area (sqm)?
Mga magkano kaya aabutin kapag 2 storeys na simple lang?
Hi Spectroplus, nag-aayos ba kayo ng mga sirang kitchen cabinets sa bahay? Alabang area po.
Hello Kevin! Thanks for dropping by our page. Are you looking to do a full kitchen area layout design and interior renovation, or is this for a specific minor carpentry repair work?
Ay hindi po buong kusina, ipapa-repair ko lang sana yung mga lumang pinto ng kitchen cabinets namin tsaka papalitan yung mga hinges kasi nasira ng baha. Mga magkano po kaya?

Hi Kevin! Thank you for reaching out. We apologize, but Spectroplus only accepts full structural residential builds, commercial fit-outs, or major interior layout renovations. We do not handle small carpentry repairs or standalone cabinet fixes at this time.

Good day! I would like to request an immediate estimate quotation outline for a commercial space interior project. Specs:

Name: Kevin Mercado (Operations Head, Mode Fashion Group)
Project Type: Clothing Boutique Retail Shop Interior Fit-out (55 sqm raw store layout area)
Address: Unit 214, 2nd Level, Upper Mall Expansion, Bonifacio High Street, Taguig City
Contact Number: 0922-888-4433 / (02) 7915-2200

May basic retail electrical grid layout specifications na kami clear from the mall coordinator panel. Open po ba kayo structural ocular grid alignment verification on Monday morning?
Hi, just checking if you received my inquiry structural request details below? Medyo urgent po sana kasi turnover code constraints na ng mall systems admin component framework this coming week.

Good day. Inquire po ako for a commercial structural improvement project framework specification data sheet description. Details:

Name: Engr. Lester Santos (Facilities Engineering Lead, Apex Warehousing Corp)
Project Type: Industrial Mezzanine Floor Office Extension (approx 110 sqm structural steel build additions framework context dynamic outline layout parameters)
Address: Blk 4 Phase II, Light Industry Science Park, Biñan, Laguna
Contact Number: 0919-888-2233 / (049) 545-9900

May approved structural drawing blueprint elements specifications na clear from our corporate safety officer control unit. Open po ba kayo contract layout documentation discussion layout profiles?

Hello Engr. Lester! Thank you for the complete specifications description. Building a structural mezzanine extension requires careful structural load calculations to ensure absolute site parameter stability code configuration compliance rules. Attached below is our official contract blueprint structure and preliminary milestone schedule profile map. Let us know if the payment tranches are okay.

Nareceive ko na yung structural contract overview draft format layout details. Maganda naman structural terms structure parameters overview, request lang kami minor balance adjustment pattern. Pwede bang hatiin sa dalawang milestones yung framework structural code payment profile sa structural masonry layout blocks setup stage? Para medyo magaan sa cash flow configuration systems operations line panel outline context.

No problem Engr. Lester! We understand the request adjustment constraint framework details structure. We will ask our legal accounting officer to update the text clauses configuration to split Phase 3 into two smaller progression checkpoints. We will send the revised formal contract draft configuration file within the day.
Hello Spectroplus? Any updates on the revised contract text configuration parameters structure sheet? Magpapasched sana kami for mobilization down payment hand-over details framework.

Cancel tracking parameters system request framework options project update. Almost 1 month already passed without a reply or document framework revision. We already signed the construction mobilization agreement contract configuration with another building contractor entity this week.

Hi Spectroplus team! Inquire sana ako for custom house construction package para sa parents ko. Itatayo po sana sa private lot namin. Details:

Name: Maria Elena Santos
Project: 1-Storey Modern Minimalist Bungalow (approx 90 sqm floor area, senior-friendly design layout)
Location: 45 Villa Segovia Street, Brgy. Bayan Luma II, Imus, Cavite
Contact Number: 0918-333-7788

Hoping to get a budget range and blueprint processing overview. Text or call me anytime po on my mobile number. Thank you!

Hi Spectroplus, nagpapatayo ba kayo ng residential apartment buildings? Magkano magagastos ko more or less sa ganitong capacity? Details:

Name: Marites Dizon
Project: 2-Storey Apartment Complex (8 Studio Units, target for rental income)
Address: 142 Alabang-Zapote Road, Brgy. Pamplona Tres, Las Piñas City
Contact Number: 0915-444-8899

Ready na po yung lot area for immediate construction build.

Hello Ma'am Marites, thanks for the detailed inquiry. An 8-unit studio apartment complex is a great investment! To maximize the unit spaces and proper fire exit pathways, we need to check the frontage width. Can we schedule a site ocular inspection this week?
Yes, available ako this coming Friday morning around 10am. Paki-confirm kung pwede kayo para maihabilin ko rin sa caretaker ng property natin.
That's noted, Ma'am Marites. We have locked in your schedule for Friday at 10:00 AM. Our lead engineer, Arch. Tech, and master plumber will be there to assess the compound layout. See you there!
Hi Ma'am Marites, our engineering team is already on the way to your lot location in Las Piñas. Just checking if we are still good for 10:00 AM today?

Hi Spectroplus, inquire sana ako for a complete design and build package. Here are my details:

Name: Mark Mendoza
Project: Custom 2-Storey Modern Minimalist House (approx 150 sqm floor area)
Location/Address: Blk 5 Lot 12, Grand Riverside Subdivision, Brgy. Mambog IV, Bacoor, Cavite
Contact Number: 0917-123-4567

Hope to get a rough estimate. Thanks!

Hello Mark! Thank you for the complete details. Yes, we do custom residential design and build packages. We can definitely work with a 150 sqm floor area on that lot size. Let me compute a rough estimate for you based on our standard finishes.

Based on a 150 sqm floor area with premium standard finishes, the rough estimate would be around 3.5M to 4M PHP. This includes the design, permits, and structural engineering. We can adjust the materials to fit your target budget perfectly.
Sige po, review-hin ko lang muna kasama si misis. Will get back to you ASAP. Sobrang ganda ng mga previous projects niyo na naka-post.
Hi Mark! Just following up if you've had a chance to look at the initial cost breakdown? We can schedule a site visit this coming weekend if you're available.

Hello Spectroplus, I would like to request an inspection and layout quotation for our new branch office site. Here are our project specifications:

Name: Michelle Lim (Operations Manager, InnoTech Solutions Inc.)
Project: Commercial Office Fit-out & Renovation (120 sqm bare layout space, needs drywalls, glass partitions, executive rooms, and network cabling)
Location: Unit 902, North Tower, Madrigal Business Park, Alabang, Muntinlupa
Contact Number: 0918-555-6677

We need to finish the mobilization works within 2 months. Do you have slots available for site ocular this coming Tuesday morning?

Good afternoon, Ms. Michelle! Thank you for considering Spectroplus for your corporate expansion. We have a robust portfolio of office layouts in Muntinlupa. Our estimation team is free to conduct a structural ocular space assessment on Tuesday. I will text you at your contact number to confirm the property manager permit guidelines.

Hello, inquire po ako para sa pagpapagawa ng bakod at main gate ng bahay namin. Details below:

Name: Nancy Villanueva
Project Type: Perimeter Fence Construction (15 meters length) & Modern Steel Sliding Gate
Address: Blk 2 Lot 4, Villa Elena Subdivision, Brgy. Molino III, Bacoor, Cavite
Contact Number: 0922-777-3344

Sana matulungan niyo kami para ma-secure yung property property project namin. Salamat.

Good day Ma'am Nancy! Thank you for reaching out to Spectroplus. Yes, we accept perimeter steel gates and structural fencing projects around Cavite. We offer custom laser-cut panel designs or standard modern tubular designs. Which pattern style do you prefer?
Gusto ko po sana yung minimalist design na matte black powder-coated frame panels. Tapos medyo makapal yung bakal para matibay talaga sa bagyo. Magkano magiging total quotation pag ganun?

Hi Ma'am Nancy, here is the updated itemized quote for the 15-meter fence. Upgrading the gate to a heavy matte-black powder-coated finish brings the total contract cost to 145,000 PHP, inclusive of concrete footing reinforcements and labor.
Hi Ma'am Nancy! Good afternoon. Just checking if you would like to proceed with the heavy gauge BI sheets for the gate panel? We can schedule fabrication works next week if finalized.

Good day Ms. Patricia! Our architectural design framework team has finalized the initial 3D exterior and interior structural rendering layouts for your review. Please see the attached image files below.
Wow!! Ganda ng pagkakagawa niyo sa Master Bedroom layout layout structure. Tamang-tama yung space allocation para sa walk-in closet line.

Sobrang nagustuhan din ni husband yung exterior accents! Request lang sana kami ng konting bawas sa steel frames doon sa floor profile windows. Mas gusto kasi namin yung seamless facade aesthetic if possible.

Got it, Ms. Patricia! We will adjust the balcony layout to use tempered glass panels instead of steel railings, and we'll lighten the wood accent finishes to a natural oak shade. We will send the updated 3D perspective views by Thursday afternoon.

Good day! Ask ko lang po sana kung magkano package niyo for custom residential build. Complete info below:

Name: Renato Dizon
Project Type: 2-Storey Modern Single-Detached House (4 Bedrooms)
Lot Location: Blk 9 Lot 22, Avida Settings, Brgy. Molino IV, Bacoor, Cavite
Contact Number: 0917-444-5566

Ready na po yung clean lot title at land specifications namin if kailangan niyo mapping data. Hope to hear from you.
Hello Spectroplus? Follow up ko lang po itong message ko if ever active pa itong page niyo? Magpapasched sana kami ng ocular inspection. Salamat.

Good day! Magtatanong lang sana ako kung nag-gagawa kayo ng structural backyard pavilion layout? Details po:

Name: Ricardo Santos
Project: Modern Open-Air Concrete Pavilion / Gazebo (approx 35 sqm with outdoor kitchen counter)
Location: 88 Mahogany Drive, Vista Verde Village, Brgy. San Roque, Antipolo, Rizal
Contact Number: 0908-111-2233

May basic inspiration layout na ako, hope to discuss details with your designers. Thanks!

Hello Ricardo! Welcome to Spectroplus. Yes, we construct premium outdoor concrete structures, pavilions, and custom landscape additions. Based on your dimensions, we can definitely build a wonderful open-air lounge area. Check out this similar outdoor pavilion design project portfolio we completed last quarter.

Wow, ganda! Ang galing ng combination ng concrete columns and wood accents. Pwede bang lagyan natin ng open ceiling with exposed roof trusses doon sa interior design layout? Para magmukhang modern resort lounge talaga.

Yes, we can absolutely integrate an exposed wooden structural truss ceiling with warm pin-lights to achieve that resort lounge look! We have updated the 3D drawing to reflect this change. You can check the final render layout attachment below.
Hi Sir Ricardo! Just following up if we are good to finalize the material orders? Our structural crew is ready for mobilization anytime you give the go-signal.
Boss tanong lang, may available ba kayong hulugang pabahay sa Cavite? Magkano monthly kapag sa Pag-IBIG fund kinuha?

Hello Ryan! Spectroplus is a private custom construction contractor. This means you must already own a lot/land property, and then we will customize the house design and handle the actual construction build for you. Do you already have a private lot available?
Ah ganoon ba boss, akala ko parang developer kayo na may gawa nang mga bahay na huhulugan buwan-buwan sa Pag-IBIG. Sige salamat po.
